spawn_general_sub_agent: spawn a general sub-agent to autonomously complete a complex multi-step task with full tool access
launch_explore_sub_agent: launch an explore sub-agent to read-only investigate the codebase and report findings without modifying files
run_plan_sub_agent: run a plan sub-agent to design an implementation approach and return a detailed step-by-step plan
spawn_background_sub_agent: spawn a sub-agent in the background and check its status later using the returned agent_id
check_background_agent_status: check the status and results of a background sub-agent using its agent_id
